title: zygia andaquiensis
intro: Zygia andaquiensis, also known as the "Andaqui Tree," is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zygia andaquiensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Zygia andaquiensis typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves and bark, which can be used to treat various ailments.
